calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2017 Off Calendar

Defendants Unum Group And Provident Life And Accident Insurance Companys Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever Plaintiffs Seventh Cause Of Action For Writ Of Mandamus Against Dave Jones As Commissioner Of Insurance And To Transfer Venue To Orange County
Off Calendar Oct-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT UNUM GROUP, PROVIDENT LIFE & ACCIDENT INSURANCE COMPANY's Motion To Sever Plaintiffs Seventh Cause Of Action For Writ Of Mandamus Against Dave Jones As Commissioner Of Insurance And To Transfer Venue To Orange County is off calendar pursuant to plaintiff's statement of non-opposition and the parties' submitted stipulation and [proposed] order that severs causes of action 1-6 and transfers them to Orange County. The stipulation and proposed order is signed and filed in open court. The plaintiff is responsible for the transfer fees.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported. (L&M302)
